name: aria51-monorepo
description: Accessibility testing platform — axe-core, keyboard navigation, WCAG 2.2 checks, screen reader simulation, and AI-powered auditing

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @aria51/core build && pnpm --filter @aria51/ai-auditor build && pnpm --filter @aria51/cli --filter @aria51/mcp build
scripts.clean: pnpm -r exec rm -rf dist node_modules && rm -rf node_modules

author: Justin Irizarry
